name: Premium Wireless Headphones
description: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and premium sound quality.

name: ProBook Ultra 15" Laptop
description: Ultra-powerful 15" laptop with latest Intel processor, 32GB RAM, and stunning 4K display. Perfect for professionals and content creators.

warranty.coverage: Hardware defects, accidental damage protection available

customerReviews.author: Sarah Chen
customerReviews.title: Amazing laptop for video editing!
customerReviews.content: Absolutely fantastic! The 4K display is incredible for color grading, and the RTX 4070 handles 4K video editing like a dream. Battery life is solid too.

customerReviews.author: Michael Rodriguez
customerReviews.title: Best investment for my creative work
customerReviews.content: Fast performance, beautiful display, and excellent build quality. Runs all my software smoothly. Highly recommended for professionals.

customerReviews.author: Emma Watson
customerReviews.title: Great but slightly pricey
customerReviews.content: Excellent performance and build quality. Only minor complaint is the price, but you get what you pay for. Worth it if you need power.

qaItems.question: Can this laptop handle gaming?
qaItems.answer: Yes! The RTX 4070 handles AAA games at high settings with 60+ FPS. It's not primarily a gaming laptop, but gaming performance is excellent.

qaItems.question: Is the display good for photo editing?
qaItems.answer: The 4K OLED display is excellent for photo editing with 100% DCI-P3 color gamut. It's factory calibrated for accurate colors.

qaItems.question: What's the upgrade potential?
qaItems.answer: RAM and storage are not user-upgradeable. However, the laptop comes with powerful specs that should last several years for most users.

name: Mechanical Keyboard RGB
description: Professional mechanical keyboard with RGB backlighting, hot-swappable switches, and aluminum frame.

name: 4K Webcam
description: Ultra HD 4K webcam with auto-focus and built-in microphone. Perfect for streaming and video calls.

name: USB-C Hub 7-in-1
description: Multi-port USB-C hub with HDMI, USB 3.0, SD card reader, and power delivery. Compact and portable.

name: Portable SSD 1TB
description: Ultra-fast portable SSD with 1TB capacity, USB-C 3.1 connectivity, and rugged design.

name: Monitor Light Bar
description: Auto-dimming monitor light bar that reduces eye strain with ambient light sensing.

name: Wireless Mouse
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with precision tracking and 18-month battery life.

name: LENOVO THINKPAD T440
description: Grade A refurbished Lenovo ThinkPad T440 - a reliable business laptop with excellent build quality. Perfect for professionals and everyday computing.

specs.Ports: 3x USB 3.0, HDMI, VGA, Ethernet, Audio Jack

customerReviews.author: Ahmed Hassan
customerReviews.title: Excellent value for money!
customerReviews.content: Great refurbished laptop! Condition is exactly as described - looks brand new. Fast shipping and excellent customer service. Highly recommended for anyone on a budget.

customerReviews.author: Lisa Johnson
customerReviews.title: Perfect for work and browsing
customerReviews.content: Very reliable ThinkPad. Battery lasts a solid 7 hours, keyboard is comfortable, and it runs all my work applications smoothly. Great purchase!

customerReviews.author: Mark Chen
customerReviews.title: Good laptop, minor scratches
customerReviews.content: Overall excellent condition. Few minor cosmetic scratches but works perfectly. Fast performance for the price. Would buy again.

qaItems.question: Is this laptop suitable for heavy tasks?
qaItems.answer: The i5 4th Gen handles general computing, office work, and light development well. It's not ideal for heavy video editing or gaming, but excellent for everyday use and productivity.

qaItems.question: What does Grade A condition mean?
qaItems.answer: Grade A (Import) means the laptop has been professionally refurbished, tested thoroughly, and restored to excellent condition. It may have minor cosmetic marks but functions like new with full warranty coverage.

qaItems.question: Can I upgrade the RAM or SSD?
qaItems.answer: Yes! The ThinkPad T440 has user-accessible upgrade options. You can upgrade RAM up to 16GB and replace the SSD with a larger capacity drive.

name: Desk Organizer Set
description: Premium desk organizer set with multiple compartments for cables, pens, and accessories.

name: Cable Management Kit
description: Comprehensive cable management solution with clips, ties, and sleeves for organized desk setup.

name: Gaming Chair Ergonomic
description: Premium ergonomic gaming chair with lumbar support and 4D adjustable armrests.

name: Monitor Arm Dual
description: Adjustable dual monitor arm mount for improved desk space and ergonomics.
